chunks.title: Yahweh's Charge to Joshua
chunks.reason: Divine commission and encouragement for leadership.

chunks.title: Joshua's Orders to the Officers and Tribes
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joshua instructing officers and addressing the Reubenites, Gadites, and half-tribe of Manasseh.

chunks.title: The Tribes' Response to Joshua
chunks.reason: Verbal agreement and oath of loyalty from the tribes.
